mapper.select:
/** CmmtCodeDao.select */ select
from cmmt_code where code_group = upper(#{codeGroup}) and code = upper(#{code})

/** CmmtCodeDao.selectList */ select
from cmmt_code where code_group = upper(#{codeGroup}) order by sort_order

/** CmmtCodeDao.selectList_enabled */ select
from cmmt_code where code_group = upper(#{codeGroup}) and enabled = true
and code_type = upper(#{codeType})
order by sort_order
